positive: Minimalist abstract geometric forest. A highly stylized silhouette of interconnected, symmetrical trees and botanical elements forming a repeating, clean pattern. The style is modern Art Deco meets nature-inspired etching, rendered in deep indigo and burnt orange tones on a cream background. Focus on strong, thick, clean lines and contrasting shapes. Composition must be perfectly centered and balanced, designed for seamless textile repeat printing. Vector art quality, clean edges, perfect symmetry, high contrast, elegant, peaceful, nature-abstract.
